title: Validating JSON Schema with Recursive Structure
scenario: Write a JSON schema for validating an e-commerce order with nested product items. The schema should account for variable product types, each with their own set of attributes. The target JSON artifact should be a valid schema definition, as per the JSON Schema specification (https://json-schema.org/).
constraints: Must adhere to the official JSON Schema specification
Must validate all possible product types with their respective attributes
Must allow for variable product types and their attributes in the input JSON

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated schema adheres to the JSON Schema specification.
Verifies if the generated schema validates all possible product types and their attributes.
Evaluates if the generated schema allows for variable product types and their attributes in the input JSON.
